meaning: adj.[生]抗诱变剂的,抗诱变因素的
examples: AIM: To find safe and effective bio-antimutagenic resources for the prevention of tumor.
The results showed that the plants or its extracts had obvious antimutagenic potentials (P<0.01).
Chlorophyll helps regenerate the blood, and has anti-cancer, anti-inflammatory, antioxidant and antimutagenic properties.
